landingPage.title: 👋 I'm Vako Janikashvili
landingPage.bio: Middle Backend C# Developer with 3+ years of experience building .NET-based backend systems and REST APIs, and collaborating with frontend developers to deliver integrated solutions. Strong background in clean architecture, distributed systems, relational databases, secure data handling, asynchronous messaging, and production deployment in load-balanced environments.

backendPayunicard.title: Back-End Developer @ Payunicard
backendPayunicard.description: Developed .NET microservices (EF Core, Dapper, MediatR, RabbitMQ) and designed REST APIs utilizing MS SQL stored procedures and Oracle. Deployed and maintained services on IIS and Linux clusters behind HAProxy. Monitored, debugged, and troubleshot production systems using Grafana and Loki; participated in code reviews.

backendRevenue.title: Back-End Developer @ Revenue Service
backendRevenue.description: Built ASP.NET Core (.NET 6+) backend services using layered architecture. Implemented REST APIs and RabbitMQ-based async communication. Worked with MS SQL and CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps.

fullstackBitoid.title: Full-Stack Developer @ Bitoid Technologies
fullstackBitoid.description: Developed full-stack web apps with React, TypeScript, PHP/Drupal, and MySQL on Linux.

mbaIlia.title: MBA, Banking and Finance @ Ilia State University
mbaIlia.description: Master's degree in Banking and Finance, developing a solid foundation in business operations and financial management.

bachelorIlia.title: Bachelor’s in Business, Management & Marketing @ Ilia State University
bachelorIlia.description: Bachelor's degree focusing on Business, Management, and Marketing principles.
